title: Exposed Sensitive Data
description: Due to the lack of data classification and sensitivity information, it's unclear whether sensitive data (e.g., personal information, financial data) is being handled securely.  Unencrypted data at rest or in transit increases the risk of exposure through unauthorized access, theft, or interception.
attack_vector: Unauthorized access to data stores, insecure network connections, vulnerabilities in data transmission protocols.
mitigations: Conduct a data classification exercise to identify and categorize sensitive data.
Implement data encryption at rest and in transit.
Enforce strict access controls based on the principle of least privilege.
